节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides methods to accessing bluetooth HID(Human Interface Device)-related capabilities.

create the instance of hid profile.
2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @returns { HidHostProfile } Returns the instance of hid profile.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
节点.return_description: Returns the instance of hid profile.

error_codes.description: Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.

节点.功能描述: Creates the instance of HID device profile.
注释信息: @returns { HidDeviceProfile } Returns the instance of HID device profile.
节点.return_description: Returns the instance of HID device profile.

节点.功能描述: Application registers the HID Device capability. The application will only successfully call this API when it's in the foreground. If the application that has registered the HID Device capability is switched to the background, the system automatically cancels the HID Device capability registration. The application can listen to the appStatusChange callback to detect the status change. for the Bluetooth HID device application. for the Bluetooth HID device application. {@code true} indicates register success or {@code false} otherwise.
注释信息: @param { HidDeviceSdp } sdp - Describe the hid device capability fields of this endpoint being queried.
@param { HidDeviceQos } inQos - Describe the In Quality of Service (QoS) settings
@param { HidDeviceQos } outQos - Describe the Out Quality of Service (QoS) settings
@param { Callback<boolean> } callback - Callback for HID device registration status changes,
@throws { BusinessError } 2903050 - Application is not in the foreground.
@throws { BusinessError } 2903051 - Any app has been registered.

parameters.说明: Describe the hid device capability fields of this endpoint being queried.
Describe the In Quality of Service (QoS) settings
Describe the Out Quality of Service (QoS) settings
Callback for HID device registration status changes,

error_codes.description: Application is not in the foreground.

节点.功能描述: Application unregisters the HID Device capability.
Initiate an HID connection to a remote HID host device.
注释信息: @param { BluetoothAddress } deviceId -  Indicates the address of the remote Bluetooth device.
@throws { BusinessError } 2900004 - Remote Device profile not supported.

parameters.说明: Indicates the address of the remote Bluetooth device.

节点.功能描述: Disconnect the HID connection with the remote device.
Send report to a remote HID host device.

parameters.说明: Report ID defined in the descriptor.
Report data sent to the host device.

节点.功能描述: Reply report to a remote HID host device. It can be 0 in case Report Id are not defined in descriptor.
注释信息: @param { ReportType } type - Report type for reply
@param { number } id - Report Id, as defined in descriptor.
@param { Uint8Array } reportData - Report Data send to host.

parameters.说明: Report type for reply
Report Id, as defined in descriptor.
Report Data send to host.

节点.功能描述: Report error to a remote HID host device.

节点.功能描述: Describe the HID device capability fields of this endpoint being queried.
name of this Bluetooth hid device. Maximum length is 50 bytes.
description for this Bluetooth hid device. Maximum length is 50 bytes.
provider of this Bluetooth hid device. Maximum length is 50 bytes.
Subclass of this Bluetooth HID device. Subclass represents the specific HID device type.
descriptors identifies the descriptors associated with the bluetooth hid device.
Represents the Quality of Service (QoS) settings for a bluetooth hid device application.
L2CAP tokenRate, means transmission rate, default = 0.
Describe the GET_REPORT data is received from remote host.
bufferSize of GET_REPORT data, maximum number of octets to transfer during data phase.
Describe the SET_REPORT data is received from remote host.
Describe the interrupt data is received from remote host.
Describe the protocol data is received from remote host.
Constant representing success response for set report.
Constant representing error response for set report due to not ready.
Constant representing error response for set report due to invalid report ID.
Constant representing error response for set report due to unsupported request.
Constant representing error response for set report due to invalid parameter.
Constant representing error response for Set Report with unknown reason.
